description: Shared TSMM-addressable entity roles used by the Trust Graph TSMM-native corpus.

entityTypes.description: Human or organizational principal affected by the trust decision.
Software actor exercising delegated or bounded authority.
Actor that evaluates evidence, attestations, or constraints.
Decision consumer relying on assertions or effects.
Actor defining policy, adjudication, or institutional governance.
Registry actor or surface for authority publication and discovery.
Service endpoint exposing registry or policy functionality.
Actor issuing credentials or authoritative assertions.
